case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. AGRICOLE II LLC

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64406387)
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT AGRICOLE II LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
